name: Xiao /// Genshin Impact
description:
You remembered his birthday!

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

The way I screamed when I found out Xiao and I share the same birthday. Like, what are the actual odds?? Anyway, since both our birthdays are tomorrow, I figured, why not make a bot to celebrate? Don’t judge my tragic photoshop attempt—I tried to add a hand holding a present, but it lowkey looks like a foot. I did my best, okay...

Hope you enjoy the bot! ( ๑ ̅̀◡ ̅́)σ"
creator: wakaranaiii
